subject: Old - English
note: Practice feed me correct answer nahi hota; jaha ID important-questions se match hua waha answer bhara hai (answer_source).

questions.question_text: Shruti ________ to study now.

Try this dessert and let me know how it ________.
The policeman ________ him.
The judge ________ his verdict.
The climate in our city ________ warmer.

Find the error: I missed the last bus which I usually catch and have to stay back at the bus stop last night.

options.label: B
options.text: I missed the last bus which I usually catch

options.label: C
options.text: at the bus stop last night.

questions.question_text: Find the error: Her goal is to win gold medal in the Asian games and made her country proud.

options.label: B
options.text: Her goal is to win gold medal

questions.question_text: Find the error: He firmly believe that if any disease is detected early then it can be cured by yoga.

options.label: C
options.text: It can be cured by yoga.

options.label: D
options.text: if any disease is detected early then

questions.question_text: Find the error: Shivam takes charge of the project within a few days of appointment.

options.label: B
options.text: the project within a few days

questions.question_text: Find the error: Economists have predicted that the country's economic growth falls low to eight percent this year.

options.label: D
options.text: falls low to eight per cent this year.

questions.correct_answer: falls low to eight per cent this year.
questions.solution: falls low to eight per cent this year.

questions.question_text: I ________ for the Swiss delegation to arrive for over an hour.
questions.solution: 'have been waiting' is the correct alternative for the given blank.

questions.question_text: The doctor ________ an operation.
He thought my car ________ for sale.
Find the error: Neither he nor his brother can walk faster than me.
Find the error: It is easy distinguishing this pen from that.
questions.solution: It is easy to distinguish this pen from that.

questions.question_text: He stood ________ as a rock and faced the challenge.
questions.solution: He stood solid as a rock and faced the challenge.

questions.question_text: Find the error: His father died of cholera but his mother also though very weak, is out of danger.

options.label: C
options.text: though very weak, is out of danger

questions.solution: His father died of cholera but his mother also was not though very weak, is out of danger.

questions.question_text: Find the error: Jayesh is getting fatter because he does not take exercise at all.

options.label: C
options.text: does not take exercise at all

questions.solution: Jayesh is getting fat because he does not take exercise at all.

questions.question_text: Find the error: She is the best and beautiful girl of our village.
questions.solution: She is the best and most beautiful girl of our village.

questions.question_text: Find the error: Some people get used to changes very easily than others do.
questions.solution: Some people get used to change more easily than other do.

questions.question_text: Find the error: Do you know that it was I who has done this piece of beautiful work?

options.label: D
options.text: Do you know that it was I

questions.solution: Do you known that it was I who have done this piece of beautiful work?

questions.question_text: Find the error: The company has ordered some new equipments.
questions.solution: The company has ordered some new equipment.

questions.question_text: Find the error: The future of food companies seems quite secure owed to evergrowing demand.
questions.solution: The future of food companies seems quite secure owing to evergrowing demand.

questions.question_text: Find the error: Mr. Roy's youngest son is fond of playing a harmonium.
questions.solution: Replace playing a harmonium with playing of harmonium.
